data.body:
[Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment Preview]

A Rerun Pick-Up Recruitment will begin on 12/9 (Tue)!

💌Pick-Up Student: 3★ Miyako (Swimsuit), 3★ Saki (Swimsuit), 3★ Moe (Swimsuit)
🗓️Pick-Up Recruitment Schedule: 12/9 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 12/16 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

+ Sensei, Moe (Swimsuit) image has been re - uploaded due to the modifocation.
We apologize for any confusion this may have caused.
